svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ MASK R-CNN LOSS FUNCTION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
L = L_cls + L_box + L_mask
where: • L_cls: Cross-entropy for classification • L_box: Smooth L1 for bounding box regression • L_mask: Binary cross-entropy per-pixel (only for GT class)
Key insight: Mask prediction is CLASS-AGNOSTIC per RoI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── • Predict K masks (one per class) • Use only the mask corresponding to predicted class • Decouples mask and classification
